codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. ValidationOrchestrator with validate_task_completion() single entry point is implemented in swell-validation/src/orchestrator.rs. Integration tests crate (swell-integration-tests) contains 12 tests using ScenarioMockLlm for deterministic multi-turn LLM simulation, covering success and failure paths.

issues.description: Comparison `validation_result.total_duration_ms >= 0` is always true since total_duration_ms is u64. Should be removed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The integration test crate was added to the workspace Cargo.toml and lib.rs was created with module docs, following proper crate conventions. No convention gaps found.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: swell-integration-tests/Cargo.toml and src/lib.rs follow existing crate patterns in the workspace.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used the rust-worker skill correctly. Transcript shows systematic exploration of existing codebase structure before implementing. The skillFeedback.followedProcedure is not available in handoff, but the work completed successfully.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker read validation-contract.md, existing validation code, and ScenarioMockLlm before implementing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No external services or commands were started that are missing from services.yaml. All tests use in-process mocks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Integration tests use ScenarioMockLlm, in-process ValidationOrchestrator, and temp directories - no external services needed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered and properly used ValidationPipeline::add_gate() API for building orchestrator gates. No gaps in documented knowledge.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Implementation shows ValidationOrchestrator::init_gates() correctly adds LintGate, TestGate, SecurityGate, and conditionally AiReviewGate.

summary: Feature VAL-PROMPT-007 (integration tests for full execution path) and VAL-PROMPT-008 (ValidationOrchestrator provides single validate_task_completion entry point) are fully implemented. The ValidationOrchestrator in swell-validation/src/orchestrator.rs provides validate_task_completion() that runs all configured gates (lint, test, security, ai_review) and returns structured TaskValidationResult. Integration tests in swell-integration-tests crate use ScenarioMockLlm and cover success/failure paths. Minor warnings about useless comparisons (u64 >= 0) in test file.
